chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1425 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 1. 16-09-2025 On 09-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received. This Petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 16.09.2025. Let intimation notice be issued to the Counsel for the Petitioners for the next date of hearing.” Though intimation notice issued to the Counsel for the Petitioners for today, even then none has affected appearance on behalf of the Petitioners. The instant Petition is pending without any useful progress. The conduct of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
